question: How many flights depart from City 'Aberdeen' and have destination City 'Ashley'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN AIRPORTS AS T3 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T3.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Ashley" AND T3.City  =  "Aberdeen"
gold_sql_original: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN AIRPORTS AS T3 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T3.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Ashley" AND T3.City  =  "Aberdeen"
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT count(*) FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN airports AS T3 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T3.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Ashley" AND T3.City  =  "Aberdeen"
agent_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS flight_count FROM flights JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen' AND airports.City = 'Ashley' LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS flight_count FROM flights JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen' AND airports.City = 'Ashley' LIMIT 100
agent_answer: There are 0 flights that depart from City 'Aberdeen' and have destination City 'Ashley'.
